chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 1491 of 2013. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[s] 29.03.2022 FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Mumtaz Alam Leghari Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, A.A.G. Sindh. ------ On the strength of an appointment letter dated 6th July 2012, it is claimed by the petitioner that he was appointed as stenographer in BPS-11 in the Local Government Department. This petition is pending since last 09 years and the petitioner is not in a position to assist this Court as to whether any lawful procedure was adopted in the appointment of the petitioner as being stenographer in BPS-11 in the Local Government Department. This would be a futile attempt to continue with this petition as no transparent process was involved. Since no transparency in the appointment of the petitioner, the petitioners are not entitled for any indulgence or any favourable order as the process being devoid of transparency. The petition being misconceived and is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE A.
